creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213777
deprecate-py-django-registration-defaults.patch

Hi Sergey,

attached is the patch that deprecates www/py-django-registration-defaults and sets an expiration date for it.

The repository seems to be no longer maintained (last commit was in 2014) and port will become unusable once bug #245902 lands due changed paths (see issue #22 for further details.

Although there's a PR (see #23) that seems to fix the issue it's idle since more than one year.

Hence my question if it's ok for you to deprecate/expire the port?
